problems.title: Practice Midterm Q1 — Asymptotic T/F
problems.blurb: Six T/F claims testing definitions, recurrence shapes, and median-of-medians dominance.

problems.title: Practice Midterm Q2 — Recursion Tree for $T(n) = 3T(n/5) + n$
problems.blurb: Draw the recursion tree, compute per-level work, sum the series, state $\Theta$.

problems.title: Practice Midterm Q3 — Induction for $T(n) = T(n/2) + T(n/3) + n = O(n)$
problems.blurb: Formal inductive proof of an $O(n)$ bound on an unbalanced recurrence.

problems.title: Practice Midterm Q4 — Pareto-Undominated Points (D&C)
problems.blurb: Design an $O(n \log n)$ algorithm for the undominated / Pareto-frontier problem.

problems.title: Practice Midterm Q5 — Word Break DP
problems.blurb: State recurrence and base case for word-break segmentation; $O(n^2)$.

problems.title: Practice Midterm Q6 — Ten Envelopes (Extra Credit)
problems.blurb: Binary-representation puzzle: distribute \$1000 into 10 envelopes covering every amount \$1–\$1000.

problems.title: HW1 Q5 — Solve $T(n) = 2T(n/2) + 1$
problems.blurb: Substitute repeatedly, sum decreasing geometric, conclude $\Theta(n)$.

problems.title: HW1 Q6 — Guess $T(n) = n^p + c$ for $T(n) = T(n/3) + T(2n/3) + 1$
problems.blurb: Try $p = 1/2$, $p = 1$, $p = 2$; identify $T(n) = n - 1$ as exact solution.

problems.title: HW2 Q2 — $T(n) = 2T(n/3) + n$
problems.blurb: $\Theta(n)$: decreasing geometric with ratio $2/3$; leaves $n^{\log_3 2}$ are $o(n)$.

problems.title: HW2 Q3 — 3-Way Merge Sort
problems.blurb: Split into 3 pieces, 3-way merge, $T(n) = 3T(n/3) + n = \Theta(n \log n)$.

problems.title: HW2 Q4 — Find $i$ with $A[i] = i$ in $O(\log n)$
problems.blurb: Binary search with offset bookkeeping; uses distinct-sorted-integer monotonicity.

problems.title: HW2 Q5 — Sort a 'Close-to-Sorted' Array in $O(n)$
problems.blurb: Stack-based scan separates out-of-place elements; sort the small residual + merge.

problems.title: HW2 Q6 — Strengthen I.H. for $T(n) = 4T(n/2) + n$
problems.blurb: Plain $T(k) \le Ck^2$ fails; strengthen to $T(k) \le Ck^2 - k$.

problems.title: HW2 Extra 1 — $T(n) = T(9n/10) + T(n/10) + n$
problems.blurb: $a + b = 1$ case: constant $n$ work per full level, $\Theta(n \log n)$.

problems.title: PSS3 Q2 — Search in a Row/Col-Sorted Matrix
problems.blurb: Walk from top-right corner — each step eliminates a row or column. $O(n)$.

problems.title: PSS3 Q4 — Majority Element (Equality Test Only)
problems.blurb: D&C: majority of union is majority of one half (or missing).
